floor_history.headline: fable-blitz deep recon: csmd4 IS marionation region-1's cheaper twin (no region-3) - the whole gap is the in-place-basin v1/a0 allocation-equation flip (pri(arg5) > pri(t0)); the wrap-weighting x in-p

Structural axis (decl order, s32/u32 narrow, statement re-assoc under arg5-after-t0) closed directly on csmd4: 4/4 masked-INERT at 2, head-order flip regresses to 7 - twin's structural closure confirm

Structural axis on csmd4 h5 base fully closed: 13 variants swept (var-splits, expression compression, decl-position, pointer-deref form) — 8 INERT at masked 2, 5 measured regressions (t0s-split=3, arg
Frontier top-3 cleared: do-while(0) wrap direction-invariant +2 insns (KILLS pri-lift lever), cnt-carrier regresses to masked 4, volatile fmt-carrier policy-rejected. h5 floor holds at 2.
s5 permuter: all 3 frontier hypotheses (block-scope multi-set carrier, named-dispatch reorder, nested do-while(0)) KILLED with measurements; h5 masked-2 floor holds

s6 forensics: instrumented cc1 names the h5 masked-2 residual as sched.c::adjust_priority LAUNCH-vs-LAUNCH LUID tiebreak between insn 111 (p106=p101<<2, single-set via mult-by-power-of-2 expander) and

s7 forensics: h5 basin's LAUNCH sentinel on insn 111 originates at expmed.c::expand_mult case alg_shift line 2244 (hardcoded NULL_RTX target); frontier #1 (combine.c num_sets lever) KILLED — MIPS md h
s8 rederive: honest idx_1495=idx_1494+1 (from prologue asm) regresses +13 masked; m2c-derived shape is known-killed inline-all form
s9 rederive: 4 sibling-transplant probes from marionation_Exec twin all KILLED; s-reg webs disjoint despite shared surface residual

s10 synthesis: only (b) 'kill 121 LAUNCH keep 111 LAUNCH' survives the s7-CONFIRMED expmed.c wall; frontier reset to arg5_addr two-SET (algebraic-cancel + opaque-carrier variants) as the direct hit on

frontier.hypothesis: M1-primary: arg5_addr algebraic-cancellation two-SET (`arg5_addr = v0 + t0; arg5_addr += (s32)tbl_125c - t0;`) makes p107 flow-time multi-set → insn 121 loses LAUNCH → 111 wins strict priority → pair flips.
frontier.mechanism: sched.c::birthing_insn_p depends on flow.c reg_n_sets computed BEFORE sched2. Two distinct SETs of arg5_addr surviving cse.simplify_plus_minus to flow yields reg_n_sets(p107)=2, non-LAUNCH on 121. 111 stays LAUNCH via expmed.c case alg_shift's fresh p106. Backward-scheduler strict priority: 111 (only LAUNCH) picked at clock 13 → emitted last → 118,121,111 = target order.
frontier.next_probe: Draft `arg5_addr` two-SET body preserving h5's t0 chain and v0 staging. FAKE-annotate: split-init-accumulation-sanctioned + defeat-cse-fold family; mechanism = birthing_insn_p reg_n_sets gate on p107. Sandbox --disable all. Instrument cc1 with BB2_SCHED_DEBUG to confirm birthing_insn_p(121) returns FALSE. Inspect .cse2 dump for whether simplify_plus_minus preserved both SETs. Layer-2 cheat-reviewer before any commit.

frontier.hypothesis: M1-secondary: if cse folds the algebraic-cancellation form, an opaque-carrier variant (`s32 t_alias = idx_1494[0] * 4; arg5_addr = v0 + t_alias; arg5_addr += (s32)tbl_125c - t_alias;`) may keep the two SETs distinct at cse's value-numbering.
frontier.mechanism: cse.c value-numbers by RTL SET_SRC canonical form. t_alias and t0 both reduce to `(mult (lbu idx_1494) 4)` via expand's mult-expander → cse's SET_SRC hash MAY unify them (they'd fold), OR cse may keep the two pseudos distinct if their SETs live in different insns with intervening non-invalidating insns. The probe measures cse's granularity.
frontier.next_probe: Only run if M1-primary produces masked=2 or worse (cse folded, no LAUNCH change). Same FAKE annotation family + reviewer contract. If both variants fold, the mechanism is dead and frontier collapses to decomp.me only.

frontier.hypothesis: decomp.me corpus scrape via tools/decomp_me_scrape.py against asm/funcs/cpu_side_move_dir_4.s may surface a structurally distinct C form from the BB2 toolchain class (gcc2.7.2-psx / gcc2.7.2-cdk / psyq3.5).
frontier.mechanism: Coarse asm-overlap pre-filter; manual inspection of top hits could reveal an original-source shape our search space missed. Untested since s9 (module unavailable).
frontier.next_probe: Operator installs curl_cffi in .venv (`source .venv/bin/activate && pip install curl_cffi`). Then s11+ rederive session runs `python3 tools/decomp_me_scrape.py search --asm-file asm/funcs/cpu_side_move_dir_4.s` and manually inspects top asm-overlap hits. Not actionable in a self-contained grind session.
